arxiv_papers.title: PackForcing: Short Video Training Suffices for Long Video Sampling and Long Context Inference
arxiv_papers.snippet: Autoregressive video diffusion models have demonstrated remarkable progress, yet they remain bottlenecked by intractable linear KV-cache growth, temporal repetition, and compounding errors during long-video generation. arxiv_papers.title: CHIRP dataset: towards long-term, individual-level, behavioral monitoring of bird populations in the wild
arxiv_papers.snippet: Long-term behavioral monitoring of individual animals is crucial for studying behavioral changes that occur over different time scales, especially for conservation and evolutionary biology.
